CustomField.formula: (IF(Post_2014_Inc_Limits_Adopted__c=false,1,IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2019, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2019__c+1,1))* IF(Post_2014_Inc_Limits_Adopted__c=false,1,IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2018, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2018__c+1,1))* IF(Post_2014_Inc_Limits_Adopted__c=false,1,IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2017, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2017__c+1,1))* IF(Post_2014_Inc_Limits_Adopted__c=false,1,IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2016, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2016__c+1,1))* IF(Post_2014_Inc_Limits_Adopted__c=false,1,IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2015, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2015__c+1,1))* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2014, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2014__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2013, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2013__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2012, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2012__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2011, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2011__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2010, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2010__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2009, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2009__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2008, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2008__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2007, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2007__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2006, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2006__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2005, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2005__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2004, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2004__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2003, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2003__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2002, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2002__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2001, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2001__c+1,1)* IF( Initial_Rental_Pricing_Year__c < 2000, $Setup.Rental_Increases__c.X2000__c+1,1)-1)
CustomField.label: Vacancy Increase Percent
